大小单双教程.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239387320_66224022<br>vk.com/topic-239387324_65169682<br>vk.com/topic-239387361_66832208<br>vk.com/topic-239387380_66224029<br>vk.com/topic-239387389_65946952<br>vk.com/topic-239387374_65169694<br>vk.com/topic-239387370_66224039<br>vk.com/topic-239387288_65677525<br>vk.com/topic-239370563_65324581<br>vk.com/topic-239387378_65677548<br>vk.com/topic-239387323_65324568<br>vk.com/topic-239387314_65169725<br>vk.com/topic-239387315_65091418<br>vk.com/topic-239387308_65677565<br>vk.com/topic-239387289_65946984<br>vk.com/topic-239387284_65169730<br>vk.com/topic-239387281_66832249<br>vk.com/topic-239387302_65755860<br>vk.com/topic-239387291_66832251<br>vk.com/topic-239387282_65755864<br>vk.com/topic-239387293_65324608<br>vk.com/topic-239387309_65946986<br>vk.com/topic-239387329_65946988<br>vk.com/topic-239387285_65091427<br>vk.com/topic-239327849_65946998<br>vk.com/topic-239327912_65755889<br>vk.com/topic-239387317_66611073<br>vk.com/topic-239387304_65169797<br>vk.com/topic-239387310_66224144<br>vk.com/topic-239387330_66224147<br>vk.com/topic-239327980_66224148<br>vk.com/topic-239387367_66611094<br>vk.com/topic-239387298_65677612<br>vk.com/topic
